LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_Combat_Helmet.label: US Army Combat Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_Combat_Helmet.descr: The standard-issue US Army Combat Helmet of 2077, designed to complement the advanced composite plating and modular features of the armor. Widely deployed alongside its armor counterpart, it provides robust protection against ballistic and energy threats while maintaining comfort and tactical functionality. Integrated with environmental seals and communication interfaces, this helmet exemplifies the pinnacle of military headgear technology in the United States.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Winterized_Army_Combat_H: The winterized variant of the US Army Combat Helmet, issued in 2077 for operations in extreme cold environments. Enhanced with advanced thermal insulation, weatherproofing, and an integrated facial protection system, it maintains the robust protection and sophisticated features of the standard model while ensuring comfort and operational effectiveness in harsh winter conditions. The built-in thermal faceguard offers superior coverage against wind and frostbite, while integrated environmental seals and communication interfaces remain standard, making this helmet essential for cold-weather deployments.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Marine_Combat_Helmet.des: The standard-issue US Marine Corps Combat Helmet of 2077, engineered specifically for the elite Marine Corps with enhanced ballistic protection and amphibious operation capabilities. Features advanced composite materials, integrated communication systems, environmental seals, and a built-in atmospheric filtration system that provides protection against chemical agents, toxic gases, and environmental hazards. This helmet represents the pinnacle of Marine Corps tactical headgear technology.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Marine_Diving_Helmet.des: A specialized diving helmet used by United States Marine Corps combat divers and underwater demolition teams. Features an integrated breathing system, reinforced visor, and communication equipment designed for underwater operations. Provides excellent protection against environmental hazards while maintaining clear vision and communication capabilities during amphibious assaults.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_General_Cap.label: US Army General Cap
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_General_Cap.descrip: A distinguished cap issued to generals of the United States Army, symbolizing command and tradition. Its immaculate condition and ornate details reflect the prestige and authority of America's military leadership.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Winterized_Army_General_: A white variant of the US Army General Cap, issued for winter use. It retains the same distinguished appearance and authority as the standard cap, with no additional insulation or weatherproofing.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Secret_Service_Helmet.de: An advanced tactical helmet issued to United States Secret Service agents. Featuring reinforced composite construction, integrated communication systems, and ballistic face protection, this helmet provides comprehensive head protection while maintaining situational awareness. The sleek matte-black finish and professional appearance allow agents to remain imposing yet discreet during protective operations.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_T65_Power_Armor_Helmet.d: The helmet component of the legendary T-65 Secret Service Power Armor. This masterwork of engineering incorporates the most advanced heads-up display systems, threat detection arrays, and life support equipment ever fielded by the United States. The multi-layered composite construction provides superior protection against all known threats while maintaining perfect environmental sealing and combat awareness.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_T51_Power_Armor_Hel: US Army T-51 Power Armor Helmet

A United States Army variant of the T-51 power armor helmet. Painted in military olive drab with Army insignia, this helmet provides the legendary protection of the T-51 system while marking its wearer as a member of the pre-war American mechanized infantry.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_T60_Power_Armor_Hel: US Army T-60 Power Armor Helmet

The helmet component of the United States Army's T-60 power armor. Bearing the colors and insignia of the pre-war military, this advanced helmet combines cutting-edge heads-up display technology with maximum protection, representing the peak of American power armor engineering before the Great War.
